positive: A stylized, ethereal celestial forest scene. The main subject is a majestic, branching nebula tree with luminescent, glowing leaves in shades of deep sapphire, amethyst, and neon teal. The roots gently intertwine with stylized constellations and glowing zodiac symbols. Floating elements include crystalline orbs and geometric stellar dust. The composition is highly symmetrical and centralized, designed for a central print placement. Style is a blend of Art Nouveau and futuristic cosmic fantasy, rendered with thick, clean black lines and vibrant, saturated gradient fills (highly contrasted). The background should be a deep, velvety indigo to black gradient. Intricate details must remain visually pop and clean for apparel printing. Flat graphic illustration quality with volumetric lighting, deep shadows, and a strong silhouette contrast.
negative: low resolution, blurry, grainy, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, out of frame, messy, noise, low contrast, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poor quality
